mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_report ( inverter_id, base_date, day_offset, value_expected, value_actual, value_previous, performance_ratio, expected_ratio, capacity_factor, accum_energy, stopped_time, incident_count, weather_code ) VALUES
( #{item.inverterId}, #{item.baseDate}, #{item.dayOffset}, #{item.valueExpected}, #{item.valueActual}, #{item.valuePrevious}, #{item.performanceRatio}, #{item.expectedRatio}, #{item.capacityFactor}, #{item.accumEnergy}, #{item.stoppedTime}, #{item.incidentCount}, #{item.weatherCode} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value_expected = VALUES(value_expected), value_actual = VALUES(value_actual), value_previous = VALUES(value_previous), performance_ratio = VALUES(performance_ratio), expected_ratio = VALUES(expected_ratio), capacity_factor = VALUES(capacity_factor), accum_energy = VALUES(accum_energy), stopped_time = VALUES(stopped_time), incident_count = VALUES(incident_count), weather_code = VALUES(weather_code), updated_at = NOW()
